  "text": "The Kafka plugin/extension loading system is contained within the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package and related API files.\n\n## Core Plugin ClassLoader System\n\nThe central class is `PluginClassLoader` (isolation/PluginClassLoader.java), a custom URLClassLoader that isolates each plugin's dependencies from each other and from the Kafka Connect runtime. It is created by `ClassLoaderFactory` and `PluginClassLoaderFactory`.\n\n`DelegatingClassLoader` (isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) acts as the parent class loader that knows about all plugin class loaders and delegates to the appropriate one based on class name. It implements the parent-first/child-first delegation logic that enables plugin isolation.\n\n`LoaderSwap` (isolation/LoaderSwap.java) is an AutoCloseable utility that swaps the thread context class loader when entering plugin-specific code, ensuring the right class loader is active.\n\n## Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n\n`PluginScanner` (isolation/PluginScanner.java) is the abstract base class for plugin scanners. It has two concrete implementations:\n- `ReflectionScanner` (isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Scans plugin jars using reflection (classpath scanning) to discover plugin classes.\n- `ServiceLoaderScanner` (isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Discovers plugins using the Java ServiceLoader SPI mechanism.\n\n`PluginUtils` (isolation/PluginUtils.java) contains utilities for finding plugin jars on disk (from configured plugin.path), determining which classes are plugin types, and other scanning helpers.\n\n`PluginScanResult` (isolation/PluginScanResult.java) holds the results of a plugin scan, and `PluginDesc` (isolation/PluginDesc.java) describes an individual plugin (class, version, type, class loader).\n\n`PluginSource` (isolation/PluginSource.java) represents a source directory/jar for plugins, and `PluginType` (isolation/PluginType.java) is an enum of all supported plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.).\n\n`PluginDiscoveryMode` (isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) controls whether plugins are discovered via ServiceLoader, reflection, or both.\n\n## Interface-Based Dependency Injection\n\nThe `Plugins` class (isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade for the plugin system. It provides methods like `newConnector()`, `newConverter()`, `newHeaderConverter()`, `newPlugin()`, etc. that instantiate plugin implementations by interface type, using the appropriate isolated class loader. This is the primary dependency injection mechanism.\n\n`PluginsRecommenders` (isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) provides config recommender logic based on discovered plugins.\n\n## Plugin Interfaces (API)\n\nThe plugin interfaces that all extension points must implement:\n- `Connector` (connect/api/.../connector/Connector.java): Base interface for all connectors\n- `SinkConnector` (connect/api/.../sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink connectors\n- `SourceConnector` (connect/api/.../source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source connectors\n- `Converter` (connect/api/.../storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- `HeaderConverter` (connect/api/.../storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface for header converters\n- `Transformation` (connect/api/.../transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations (SMTs)\n- `Predicate` (connect/api/.../transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy` (connect/api/.../connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Plugin interface for client config override policies\n- `ConnectRestExtension` (connect/api/.../rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Plugin interface for REST extensions\n\n## Runtime Integration\n\n`Worker` (runtime/Worker.java) uses `Plugins` to instantiate connectors, converters, and transformations when starting tasks and connectors. `ConnectorConfig` (runtime/ConnectorConfig.java) and `WorkerConfig` (runtime/WorkerConfig.java) define configuration that references plugin class names."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Java Dependency Injection with Kafka Plugin Architecture

## Your Task

Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that implement the plugin/extension loading system: the PluginClassLoader, the plugin scanning via reflection, and the interface-based dependency injection used for Connector, Converter, and HeaderConverter plugins.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/kafka--0753c489, sg-evals/flink--0cc95fcc, sg-evals/camel--1006f047.


## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
Now let me compile the complete answer:

The answer has been written to `/workspace/answer.json`. Here's a summary of what I found:

## Kafka Plugin/Extension Loading System

The system is primarily in `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` and contains:

### Core ClassLoader Infrastructure
- **`PluginClassLoader.java`** — Custom URLClassLoader that isolates each plugin's dependencies
- **`PluginClassLoaderFactory.java`** / **`ClassLoaderFactory.java`** — Factories for creating isolated class loaders
- **`DelegatingClassLoader.java`** — Parent class loader that delegates to the appropriate plugin class loader
- **`LoaderSwap.java`** — AutoCloseable utility to swap thread context class loader

### Plugin Scanning
- **`PluginScanner.java`** — Abstract base for scanners
- **`ReflectionScanner.java`** — Scans jars via reflection/classpath scanning
- **`ServiceLoaderScanner.java`** — Discovers plugins via Java ServiceLoader SPI
- **`PluginUtils.java`** — Utilities for finding plugin jars on disk

### Plugin Registry & Metadata
- **`Plugins.java`** — Main facade; provides `newConnector()`, `newConverter()`, `newHeaderConverter()`, etc. (the DI mechanism)
- **`PluginDesc.java`**, **`PluginScanResult.java`**, **`PluginSource.java`**, **`PluginType.java`**, **`PluginDiscoveryMode.java`** — Descriptors and enumerations

### Plugin Interfaces (API)
- **`Connector.java`**, **`SinkConnector.java`**, **`SourceConnector.java`** — Connector plugin interfaces
- **`Converter.java`**, **`HeaderConverter.java`** — Data/header converter plugin interfaces
- **`Transformation.java`**, **`Predicate.java`** — SMT and predicate plugin interfaces
- **`ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java`**, **`ConnectRestExtension.java`** — Other plugin extension points

    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java", "symbol": "Plugins"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java", "symbol": "PluginDesc"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java", "symbol": "PluginScanResult"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java", "symbol": "PluginSource"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java", "symbol": "PluginType"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java", "symbol": "PluginDiscoveryMode"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java", "symbol": "PluginsRecommenders"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java", "symbol": "Connector"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java", "symbol": "SinkConnector"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java", "symbol": "SourceConnector"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java", "symbol": "Converter"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java", "symbol": "HeaderConverter"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java", "symbol": "Transformation"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java", "symbol": "ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy"},
    {"repo": "apache/kafka", "path": "connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/rest/ConnectRestExtension.java", "symbol": "ConnectRestExtension"}
  ],
  "text": "The Kafka plugin/extension loading system is contained within the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package and related API files.\n\n## Core Plugin ClassLoader System\n\nThe central class is `PluginClassLoader` (isolation/PluginClassLoader.java), a custom URLClassLoader that isolates each plugin's dependencies from each other and from the Kafka Connect runtime. It is created by `ClassLoaderFactory` and `PluginClassLoaderFactory`.\n\n`DelegatingClassLoader` (isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) acts as the parent class loader that knows about all plugin class loaders and delegates to the appropriate one based on class name. It implements the parent-first/child-first delegation logic that enables plugin isolation.\n\n`LoaderSwap` (isolation/LoaderSwap.java) is an AutoCloseable utility that swaps the thread context class loader when entering plugin-specific code, ensuring the right class loader is active.\n\n## Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n\n`PluginScanner` (isolation/PluginScanner.java) is the abstract base class for plugin scanners. It has two concrete implementations:\n- `ReflectionScanner` (isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Scans plugin jars using reflection (classpath scanning) to discover plugin classes.\n- `ServiceLoaderScanner` (isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Discovers plugins using the Java ServiceLoader SPI mechanism.\n\n`PluginUtils` (isolation/PluginUtils.java) contains utilities for finding plugin jars on disk (from configured plugin.path), determining which classes are plugin types, and other scanning helpers.\n\n`PluginScanResult` (isolation/PluginScanResult.java) holds the results of a plugin scan, and `PluginDesc` (isolation/PluginDesc.java) describes an individual plugin (class, version, type, class loader).\n\n`PluginSource` (isolation/PluginSource.java) represents a source directory/jar for plugins, and `PluginType` (isolation/PluginType.java) is an enum of all supported plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.).\n\n`PluginDiscoveryMode` (isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) controls whether plugins are discovered via ServiceLoader, reflection, or both.\n\n## Interface-Based Dependency Injection\n\nThe `Plugins` class (isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade for the plugin system. It provides methods like `newConnector()`, `newConverter()`, `newHeaderConverter()`, `newPlugin()`, etc. that instantiate plugin implementations by interface type, using the appropriate isolated class loader. This is the primary dependency injection mechanism.\n\n`PluginsRecommenders` (isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) provides config recommender logic based on discovered plugins.\n\n## Plugin Interfaces (API)\n\nThe plugin interfaces that all extension points must implement:\n- `Connector` (connect/api/.../connector/Connector.java): Base interface for all connectors\n- `SinkConnector` (connect/api/.../sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink connectors\n- `SourceConnector` (connect/api/.../source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source connectors\n- `Converter` (connect/api/.../storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- `HeaderConverter` (connect/api/.../storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface for header converters\n- `Transformation` (connect/api/.../transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations (SMTs)\n- `Predicate` (connect/api/.../transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy` (connect/api/.../connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Plugin interface for client config override policies\n- `ConnectRestExtension` (connect/api/.../rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Plugin interface for REST extensions\n\n## Runtime Integration\n\n`Worker` (runtime/Worker.java) uses `Plugins` to instantiate connectors, converters, and transformations when starting tasks and connectors. `ConnectorConfig` (runtime/ConnectorConfig.java) and `WorkerConfig` (runtime/WorkerConfig.java) define configuration that references plugin class names."
}

  "text": "The Kafka plugin/extension loading system is contained within the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package and related API files.\n\n## Core Plugin ClassLoader System\n\nThe central class is `PluginClassLoader` (isolation/PluginClassLoader.java), a custom URLClassLoader that isolates each plugin's dependencies from each other and from the Kafka Connect runtime. It is created by `ClassLoaderFactory` and `PluginClassLoaderFactory`.\n\n`DelegatingClassLoader` (isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) acts as the parent class loader that knows about all plugin class loaders and delegates to the appropriate one based on class name. It implements the parent-first/child-first delegation logic that enables plugin isolation.\n\n`LoaderSwap` (isolation/LoaderSwap.java) is an AutoCloseable utility that swaps the thread context class loader when entering plugin-specific code, ensuring the right class loader is active.\n\n## Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n\n`PluginScanner` (isolation/PluginScanner.java) is the abstract base class for plugin scanners. It has two concrete implementations:\n- `ReflectionScanner` (isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Scans plugin jars using reflection (classpath scanning) to discover plugin classes.\n- `ServiceLoaderScanner` (isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Discovers plugins using the Java ServiceLoader SPI mechanism.\n\n`PluginUtils` (isolation/PluginUtils.java) contains utilities for finding plugin jars on disk (from configured plugin.path), determining which classes are plugin types, and other scanning helpers.\n\n`PluginScanResult` (isolation/PluginScanResult.java) holds the results of a plugin scan, and `PluginDesc` (isolation/PluginDesc.java) describes an individual plugin (class, version, type, class loader).\n\n`PluginSource` (isolation/PluginSource.java) represents a source directory/jar for plugins, and `PluginType` (isolation/PluginType.java) is an enum of all supported plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.).\n\n`PluginDiscoveryMode` (isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) controls whether plugins are discovered via ServiceLoader, reflection, or both.\n\n## Interface-Based Dependency Injection\n\nThe `Plugins` class (isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade for the plugin system. It provides methods like `newConnector()`, `newConverter()`, `newHeaderConverter()`, `newPlugin()`, etc. that instantiate plugin implementations by interface type, using the appropriate isolated class loader. This is the primary dependency injection mechanism.\n\n`PluginsRecommenders` (isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) provides config recommender logic based on discovered plugins.\n\n## Plugin Interfaces (API)\n\nThe plugin interfaces that all extension points must implement:\n- `Connector` (connect/api/.../connector/Connector.java): Base interface for all connectors\n- `SinkConnector` (connect/api/.../sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink connectors\n- `SourceConnector` (connect/api/.../source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source connectors\n- `Converter` (connect/api/.../storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- `HeaderConverter` (connect/api/.../storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface for header converters\n- `Transformation` (connect/api/.../transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations (SMTs)\n- `Predicate` (connect/api/.../transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy` (connect/api/.../connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Plugin interface for client config override policies\n- `ConnectRestExtension` (connect/api/.../rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Plugin interface for REST extensions\n\n## Runtime Integration\n\n`Worker` (runtime/Worker.java) uses `Plugins` to instantiate connectors, converters, and transformations when starting tasks and connectors. `ConnectorConfig` (runtime/ConnectorConfig.java) and `WorkerConfig` (runtime/WorkerConfig.java) define configuration that references plugin class names."

  "text": "The Kafka plugin/extension loading system is contained within the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package and related API files.\n\n## Core Plugin ClassLoader System\n\nThe central class is `PluginClassLoader` (isolation/PluginClassLoader.java), a custom URLClassLoader that isolates each plugin's dependencies from each other and from the Kafka Connect runtime. It is created by `ClassLoaderFactory` and `PluginClassLoaderFactory`.\n\n`DelegatingClassLoader` (isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java) acts as the parent class loader that knows about all plugin class loaders and delegates to the appropriate one based on class name. It implements the parent-first/child-first delegation logic that enables plugin isolation.\n\n`LoaderSwap` (isolation/LoaderSwap.java) is an AutoCloseable utility that swaps the thread context class loader when entering plugin-specific code, ensuring the right class loader is active.\n\n## Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n\n`PluginScanner` (isolation/PluginScanner.java) is the abstract base class for plugin scanners. It has two concrete implementations:\n- `ReflectionScanner` (isolation/ReflectionScanner.java): Scans plugin jars using reflection (classpath scanning) to discover plugin classes.\n- `ServiceLoaderScanner` (isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java): Discovers plugins using the Java ServiceLoader SPI mechanism.\n\n`PluginUtils` (isolation/PluginUtils.java) contains utilities for finding plugin jars on disk (from configured plugin.path), determining which classes are plugin types, and other scanning helpers.\n\n`PluginScanResult` (isolation/PluginScanResult.java) holds the results of a plugin scan, and `PluginDesc` (isolation/PluginDesc.java) describes an individual plugin (class, version, type, class loader).\n\n`PluginSource` (isolation/PluginSource.java) represents a source directory/jar for plugins, and `PluginType` (isolation/PluginType.java) is an enum of all supported plugin types (CONNECTOR, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, etc.).\n\n`PluginDiscoveryMode` (isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java) controls whether plugins are discovered via ServiceLoader, reflection, or both.\n\n## Interface-Based Dependency Injection\n\nThe `Plugins` class (isolation/Plugins.java) is the main facade for the plugin system. It provides methods like `newConnector()`, `newConverter()`, `newHeaderConverter()`, `newPlugin()`, etc. that instantiate plugin implementations by interface type, using the appropriate isolated class loader. This is the primary dependency injection mechanism.\n\n`PluginsRecommenders` (isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java) provides config recommender logic based on discovered plugins.\n\n## Plugin Interfaces (API)\n\nThe plugin interfaces that all extension points must implement:\n- `Connector` (connect/api/.../connector/Connector.java): Base interface for all connectors\n- `SinkConnector` (connect/api/.../sink/SinkConnector.java): Extends Connector for sink connectors\n- `SourceConnector` (connect/api/.../source/SourceConnector.java): Extends Connector for source connectors\n- `Converter` (connect/api/.../storage/Converter.java): Interface for data converters\n- `HeaderConverter` (connect/api/.../storage/HeaderConverter.java): Interface for header converters\n- `Transformation` (connect/api/.../transforms/Transformation.java): Interface for record transformations (SMTs)\n- `Predicate` (connect/api/.../transforms/predicates/Predicate.java): Interface for transformation predicates\n- `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy` (connect/api/.../connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java): Plugin interface for client config override policies\n- `ConnectRestExtension` (connect/api/.../rest/ConnectRestExtension.java): Plugin interface for REST extensions\n\n## Runtime Integration\n\n`Worker` (runtime/Worker.java) uses `Plugins` to instantiate connectors, converters, and transformations when starting tasks and connectors. `ConnectorConfig` (runtime/ConnectorConfig.java) and `WorkerConfig` (runtime/WorkerConfig.java) define configuration that references plugin class names."
}
